target: 6. The One to Protect
(After that, Mio and I parted ways with Koyuba-san, and headed to the funeral hall.)
(The third funeral... As expected, the words and actions of Alain and the attendees were exactly the same as the 22nd I know.)
Ah, Shin-chan. So this is where you were.

Yeah, yeah.
What's up? You need something?
Dad said that since the ceremony has settled down, I should go take a break with Shin-chan.
I see.
Still, I was really surprised about Kaori-chan.
Huh? A-Ah, yeah, I guess so.
I wonder if she's at the inn by now?
When I checked my phone earlier, I had a message saying 'I arrived safely'.
You exchanged contact info before I even noticed...
She's probably having a meeting about the live show right now, isn't she? She said she was meeting up with the Chamber of Commerce people at the inn.
Ah, right.
To think a classmate would become a popular idol...
If Onee-chan found out about Kaori-chan, I bet she'd be surprised too.
If she heard that her classmate was doing a live show at the festival she loves so much, she'd definitely want to watch from the front row, right?
Haha, yeah. She'd probably be saying 'I can't wait for the festival~' almost every day.
Yeah, I can picture it.
Kaori-chan was really looking forward to the festival too, huh.
Yeah.
Well then... here. This is the flyer with the <color=#GF_TIPS_066>live show info</color>.
Thanks.
Also, if you'd like... here's some merch. I'd be happy if you brought it with you to the live show.

Thank you!
I'll definitely go!
('Talk Show & Live Info'... There's a talk show too?)
Ah, Shin-chan, this is a big deal! We have to tell Dad about this!
Why?
What do you mean, 'why'... There's gonna be a ton of fans coming just to see Kaori-chan, right?
Then we have to prepare a lot of ingredients for the restaurant too, or we might run out.
Ah, I think that'll be fine.
The location for this live show is a secret.
But both the Chamber of Commerce people and I want a lot of people to watch it.

We're planning to stream it online 
so anyone can watch.
Wow, the fans will be so happy!
Yeah, wouldn't it be a good opportunity for lots of people to learn about Hitogashima's festival?
Yeah, it's also part of the town revitalization.
Honestly, I think we'd get a bigger crowd if we didn't make it a secret, but...
Ah... if too many people came, the islanders might not be able to handle it on their own.
Yeah... That's why we decided to keep it a secret.
But what made you want to do a live show at such a small island festival?
I begged my agency to let me do it, even if it was unreasonable.
Oh, really?
I felt that because I'm an idol now, there might be things I can do to help Hitogashima.
I was raised on this island... so I'm happy to be able to give back in this way.
I see…
Back then, Koyuba-san's feelings really came across to me.
I could really feel her determination to earnestly give back to the island.
Yeah… She really must care about this island.
Yeah.
(That's why I can't just let her die.)
(I can't let that night repeat.)
Protect Mio... okay...
Shin-chan?
(Mio... entrusted to me by Ushio.)
(And our classmate, Koyuba-san, who returned home out of love for the island.)
(Even if we only just reunited, she's still one of my precious friends.)
(If so... I have to protect her.)
(Look at the big picture. What I need to do is...)
(First of all, survive today. And then...)
(Protect as many people as possible from the Shadows.)
